page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1.2xlarge is a storage-focused virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB of memory per core. A key characteristic of this instance is its bundled local storage, consisting of 23622 GB of HDD capacity. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate that the CPU and memory subsystems deliver modest performance. The stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU metrics fall into the bottom 25% tier, with scores of 1096.39 and 5838.18 respectively. Memory read bandwidth is also in the bottom 25%, measuring 327.06 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 37.11 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. However, large block write bandwidth performs at an average level of 34.88 GB/sec. Single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression show poor performance, placing in the bottom 10% tier. Static web serving throughput is measured at 4.27 GB/sec.

The primary tradeoff of the ecs.d1.2xlarge is its reliance on legacy mechanical HDD storage and older Intel Xeon architecture, which limits its computational and memory throughput. However, it offers high resource density in terms of storage capacity per unit of compute. This makes it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for workloads requiring massive local storage capacity where high-speed SSD IOPS are not critical. Suitable workloads include cold data storage, large-scale data archiving, log processing, and distributed file systems that benefit from high-capacity local HDDs.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1.2xlarge is a storage-focused virtual machine instance utilizing the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor featuring 8 dedicated physical cores running at 2.5 GHz, paired with 32.0 GB of RAM. The defining feature of this instance is its massive local storage capacity of 23622 GB on HDD, alongside a 3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks place its CPU and memory read capabilities in the lower tiers, though large block write bandwidth remains average. Given its high storage-to-compute ratio, the ecs.d1.2xlarge is qualitatively cost-efficient for storage-heavy applications. It is best suited for workloads such as data archiving, log processing, and distributed file systems that require substantial local HDD capacity rather than high-speed computational performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1.2xlarge is a storage-focused KVM instance featuring 8 Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, and 23622 GB of local HDD storage, designed for high-capacity data archiving and log processing.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1.2xlarge features 8 Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, and 23622 GB local HDD storage for high-capacity archiving workloads.
tagline: A storage-dense instance featuring massive local HDD capacity and dedicated Intel Xeon cores for high-volume data archiving and log processing.

32.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
Massive 23622 GB of local HDD storage capacity
Well-suited for cold data archiving, log processing, and distributed file systems
